info.name: IPL Auction Admin
info.description: Admin operations for IPL Auction app — change team budgets, inspect rooms, manage state

variable.description: New budget in lakhs (e.g. 12500 = ₹125 Cr, 15000 = ₹150 Cr)

item.name: 3. Change room budget (default for new auctions)

exec: console.log('Budget changed to ₹' + (pm.variables.get('new_budget_lakhs')/100) + ' Cr for room ' + pm.variables.get('room_code'));

request.description:
Changes the budget for ONE SPECIFIC ROOM (game instance) identified by code. Does NOT affect other rooms or global defaults.

Budget is in LAKHS (not crores). Examples:
- 12500 = ₹125 Cr (default)
- 15000 = ₹150 Cr
- 20000 = ₹200 Cr
- 10000 = ₹100 Cr

Scope:
- Only updates this one room's settings
- Only affects rooms in 'waiting' or 'picking_teams' status
- Once auction starts, team budgets are in host's browser memory — use the browser console script (E) in README to change live.
Only the host can delete their room (RLS policy enforced). Requires host's JWT token in Authorization header, not anon key.
Reset a stuck auction back to waiting status. Requires host privileges.
